snippet.title: Resident Evil Veronica - Announcement Trailer
snippet.description:
Survive the Deranged Terror

Resident Evil Veronica is a remake of 2000's Resident Evil Code: Veronica.

This new title preserves the essence of the original game, while introducing modernized gameplay, a reimagined storyline, and vividly detailed graphics.

In 2027, madness and intrigue, love and hate all combine to create a chilling new entry in survival horror.

For more official news and updates, follow us on:

https://www.instagram.com/re_games

snippet.title: Unstable SMP: Civil War FINALE
snippet.description:
After I Became King of the Unstable SMP, the world split into two different sides: the new players, and the old ones. After the old players took control of Highwater city, they began invading different cities across my kingdom... this time with a different strategy. This is Unstable SMP: Civil War FINALE. 

Unstable SMP:
➜ ‪  ‪  ‪‪ @FlameFragsMC 
➜      @wemmbumc 
➜     ‪‪ @Spokeishere 
➜      @ParrotX2 

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video:  @FlameFragsMC @wemmbumc @TheobaldTheBird @saparata @Lomedy @fymada  

Original Intro Song by @tsynphonia 

Blimp design: https://youtu.be/IZTobBVAJ6U?si=ZxKF8R9OQSHcCu1y 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

snippet.title: Enshrined in Crimson | New Hero Hirara Cinematic Trailer | Mobile Legends: Bang Bang
snippet.description:
With dual fans in hand, Hirara closes in amidst the flashing blades and blazing fire—
Dancing with a single fan, the meisen and maple leaves become her blades; when the dual fans unite, her killing moves transform accordingly.
"Let me save you from this crude, fleeting world."
Tap the new hero Hirara Cinematic Trailer to witness the dancing dual fans and blooming killing intent.

The new Assassin hero, Fallen Scarlet - Hirara, will be available on 06/17. Stay tuned!

Kamukha mo si Paraluman

snippet.description:
🎶 Bakit Ngayon Ka Lang is a heartfelt OPM love ballad originally popularized by Ogie Alcasid and later beautifully revived by Freestyle featuring Pops Fernandez. The song expresses the bittersweet feeling of finding the right person at the wrong time, asking why true love arrived only when life had already become complicated.

✨ Known for its emotional lyrics, soothing melodies, and heartfelt vocal performances, Bakit Ngayon Ka Lang became a favorite among OPM fans for its relatable message about timing, love, and longing. The Freestyle and Pops Fernandez version added a smooth contemporary touch while preserving the emotional depth of the original composition.

With its touching theme and timeless appeal, the song continues to resonate with listeners, capturing the pain and beauty of unexpected love.

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)
